message:
test(fnp-python): extend linalg_error_surface_probe with solve(singular)

Added solve(singular A, b) to the LinAlgError parity probe. cod's
recent native solve fast path (e08d7fd) correctly falls back to
numpy.linalg.solve on singular-A Err, preserving the LinAlgError type
("Singular matrix"). This probe locks in that behavior for future
changes.
